name: ArgosUploadResults
description: Upload JUnit/Cucumber/NUnit/xUnit/TestNG test results to TestVault (Argos) in Azure DevOps
author: ATConseil

inputs.name: pat
inputs.label: Azure DevOps PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Personal Access Token with work item read/write permissions

inputs.name: orgUrl
inputs.label: Organisation URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps organisation URL, e.g. https://dev.azure.com/acme

inputs.name: planId
inputs.label: Test Plan ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: TestVault Test Plan work item ID

inputs.name: resultsFile
inputs.label: Results file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the results file (JUnit .xml, Cucumber .json, etc.)

inputs.name: autoCreate
inputs.label: Auto-create missing test cases
inputs.helpMarkDown: Create test cases that have no matching automationKey

inputs.name: strict
inputs.label: Strict mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the task if any result has no matching test case

inputs.name: areaPath
inputs.label: Area path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Area path for auto-created test cases (defaults to project root)
